name: Skills-Manager
desc: A high-performance desktop application for managing skills across multiple AI coding assistants. Seamlessly organize, sync, and share skills for Claude Code、Co…
descFull: A high-performance desktop application for managing skills across multiple AI coding assistants. Seamlessly organize, sync, and share skills for Claude Code、Codex、Opencode and other AI tools. Built with Tauri 2.0, React 19, and Rust.
